title: salvia granatensis
intro: Salvia granatensis, also known as Granada sage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sage family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salvia granatensis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Salvia granatensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties.
